case_title: BBBB BONDING CORPORATION VS. GEORGE ARABIT JR SERVIN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BBBB BONDING CORPORATION DBA BAD BOYS BAIL BONDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERVIN, GEORGE ARABIT JR $2,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $385.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,035.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100065315)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BBBB BONDING CORPORATION DBA BAD BOYS BAIL BONDS AS TO DEFENDANT SERVIN, GEORGE ARABIT JR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-10-2018
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100065315) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $385.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $35.95 (TRANSACTION ID # 100065315) AS TO DEFENDANT SERVIN, GEORGE ARABIT JR
